# Best AI Writing Tools for Resume Building in 2026

A great resume gets your foot in the door. AI tools help you create compelling resumes that stand out from the competition!

Check out our [[link:/category/Writing|Writing category]] for more AI tools.

## [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]]: Resume Content

- **Achievement framing**: Turn responsibilities into achievements
- **Keyword optimization**: Match job descriptions
- **Professional tone**: Sound confident and capable
